title: Durable Clone To Local Build Upgrade
objective: Clone a real existing OpenClaw env into disposable state, upgrade the clone to a release-shaped local build, and verify user-state migration, plugin indexes, bundled runtime deps, and gateway health without mutating the source env.

phases.title: Clone Existing Env
phases.intent: Clone a durable existing env into a disposable Kova env before any local-build upgrade action.

phases.title: Upgrade Clone To Local Build
phases.intent: Run the real OpenClaw upgrade path against the cloned user state using the release-shaped local build runtime.

phases.title: Post-Upgrade Clone Checks
phases.intent: Verify cloned user state survives local-build upgrade, including plugin index migration and gateway readiness.
evidence: gateway logs without missing dependency/plugin load failures
